query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) as categories, COUNT(pq.id) as questions 
FROM positions p 
LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId 
LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId 
WHERE p.name IN ('SERVIS', 'RESTORAN_YONETIMI', 'IZGARA_YONETICI', 'KASA', 'IZGARA')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name 
ORDER BY p.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) as categories, COUNT(pq.id) as questions 
FROM positions p 
LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId 
LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId 
WHERE p.name IN ('SERVIS', 'RESTORAN_YONETIMI', 'IZGARA_YONETICI', 'KASA', 'IZGARA')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name 
ORDER BY p.name;
